title: Whimscape X Fresh Animations: Spiders
description: An (unofficial) add-on pack that makes Fresh Animations: Spiders compatible with Whimscape!
body:
- Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) _for his resource pack_ Whimscape

> [![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab30d3739908c7958f04d056f509c2482950f73.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)

## This pack makes [Fresh Animations: Spiders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-spiders) compatible with Whimscape
The Whimscape x Fresh Animations pack is great, but it loses some of the mob's unique animations, especially the spiders. This pack partly fixes that by making Fresh Animations: Spiders compatible with Whimscape. Now, not only is that charm back, but there are a lot more unique animations to go with it.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b79b14c9100eb654a7d0ce541fb5c38742c31e49.png)

![Spider](https://imgur.com/Bs5rB08.gif)

![Cave Spider](https://imgur.com/vGR9CHA.gif)
